# MasarCI

MasarCI is a visual GitHub Actions workflow builder with security linting. Developers can arrange triggers, jobs, and steps, inspect generated YAML, and resolve common workflow security findings before production.

## Important pages

- Home: /
- Workflow builder: /workstation (interactive tool; not an indexable content page)

## Product capabilities

- Visual workflow construction
- GitHub Actions YAML generation
- Security linting for workflow anti-patterns
- Safe auto-fixes and downloadable YAML
